ddls:
CREATE TABLE "farms" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farm */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the farm */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the farm */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farm manager responsible for the farm */,
  "area" TEXT /* Total area of the farm in hectares */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil prevalent on the farm */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the farm location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farm_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farm manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the farm manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the farm manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the farm manager */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the manager (e.g., Senior Manager, Junior Manager) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager started managing the farm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pasture_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farm where the metric is recorded */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., AverageCoverClicks, AverageFarmCover) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the metric (e.g., kg/ha) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was measured */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the metric was measured (e.g., Spring, Summer) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the metric (e.g., Satellite, Ground Survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pasture_metrics_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grazing_allocation" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grazing allocation system */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farm where the allocation system is used */,
  "allocation_type" INTEGER /* Type of grazing allocation system (0=Simple, 1=Feed Wedge) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the allocation system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the allocation system is currently active */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the allocation system was implemented */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the allocation system ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grazing_allocation_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fertilization_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fertilization event */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farm where the event occurred */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the fertilization event */,
  "fertilizer_type" TEXT /* Type of fertilizer used */,
  "effluent_paddocks" INTEGER /* Whether the fertilization applies to effluent paddocks */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the event */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of fertilizer used */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method of fertilizer application (e.g., Spraying, Broadcasting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fertilization_events_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farm where the data is accessed */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES farm_managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES pasture_metrics ("metric_id")
)
